feature1Description: Project-wide AI conventions always loaded into every Copilot session. Architecture rules, naming, import order — all in one place.
feature2Description: Deep domain knowledge files invoked on demand. Chakra UI, Effect, Zod, nuqs — loaded exactly when the task needs them.
feature3Description: File-type context auto-loaded per editing session. Editing a screen? Screen conventions appear. Editing an action? Action rules appear.
feature4Description: 2-touchpoint model: confirm requirements, then Copilot builds the entire feature end-to-end with research, implementation, review, and delivery.
heading: Optimized for GitHub Copilot
subheading: Every project convention is machine-readable. Copilot always has the right context.
